tickets.affected_task_title: RESET-01 + RESET-02 + RESET-03 — Forgot password flow end-to-end
tickets.description: Implement password reset flow via Supabase. (A) session.ts: add resetPasswordForEmail(email, redirectTo) and updateUserPassword(newPassword). (B) middleware.ts: add /forgot-password to isAuthRoute; /reset-password must NOT be redirected — return response directly for that path. (C) LoginForm.tsx: add 'Forgot password?' link to /forgot-password. (D) NEW forgot-password/page.tsx: Suspense wrapper. (E) NEW ForgotPasswordForm.tsx: email input, calls resetPasswordForEmail with window.location.origin+'/reset-password', shows confirmation on success, shows error on failure, has back-to-login link. (F) NEW reset-password/page.tsx: Suspense wrapper. (G) NEW ResetPasswordForm.tsx: on mount call getSession(); if no valid session show invalid/expired message with back-to-login link; if valid session show password+confirmPassword form; validate both non-empty, password>=8 chars, passwords match; on success call updateUserPassword then signOut then router.push('/login'); on failure show error. No manual token/localStorage handling. tsc must pass.
tickets.verification: docker compose exec frontend npx tsc --noEmit, exit 0

tickets.affected_task_title: BUG-003 + BUG-007 + BUG-009 — role landing / route separation / NavBar navigation
tickets.description: Fix role-based routing and navigation in 5 files. (1) NEW frontend/lib/auth/roles.ts: pure utils — getRoleFromJwt, getRoleFromSession, getDefaultPage(role), sanitizeRedirectTo(raw). (2) frontend/middleware.ts: use getRoleFromSession; fix authenticated+authRoute redirect to getDefaultPage(role); add admin+userFacingRoute block redirect to /admin/properties; fix non-admin+adminRoute redirect to /properties. (3) frontend/components/features/auth/LoginForm.tsx: use sanitizeRedirectTo; post-login push to getDefaultPage(role) after reading session. (4) frontend/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx: async server component, create supabase server client via createServerClient+cookies(), read session, pass role prop to NavBar. (5) frontend/components/features/properties/NavBar.tsx: accept role prop; user→Properties/Search/Favorites/Sign out; admin→Admin Console/Sign out. tsc must pass.
tickets.verification: docker compose exec frontend npx tsc --noEmit, exit 0

tickets.affected_task_title: 后端 admin role claim mismatch — security.py reads wrong JWT path
tickets.description: Fix backend/app/core/security.py only. In get_current_user(), change line 71 from: raw_role = payload.get("app_role") to: raw_role = payload.get("app_role") or payload.get("app_metadata", {}).get("app_role"). This supports both top-level app_role and app_metadata.app_role claim structures. No other files. Run pytest or equivalent backend check.
tickets.verification: docker compose exec backend pytest or equivalent, exit 0

tickets.affected_task_title: Admin role claim mismatch — middleware reads wrong JWT path
tickets.description: Fix frontend/middleware.ts only. (1) Add app_metadata?: { app_role?: AppRole } to JwtPayload interface. (2) Change admin role read logic to: const role = decodeJwtPayload(session.access_token)?.app_role ?? decodeJwtPayload(session.access_token)?.app_metadata?.app_role — supporting both top-level and app_metadata claim structures. No other files. tsc must pass.
tickets.verification: npx tsc --noEmit in frontend directory, exit 0; then manual retest ADMIN-01

tickets.affected_task_title: 登录无反应 — allowedDevOrigins fix attempt
tickets.description: Add allowedDevOrigins to frontend/next.config.mjs: ["192.168.31.136", "192.168.31.221", "100.102.19.18"]. No other files. Restart frontend container. Verify Console has no blocked cross-origin warnings and login calls Supabase auth.
tickets.verification: Manual: restart frontend, open /login, check Console for blocked-cross-origin warnings, attempt login, verify Supabase auth request in Network tab and successful redirect

tickets.affected_task_title: BUG-004 — Clear Filters 仅在 no-results 状态显示
tickets.description: Fix search page Clear Filters UX. Codex: (1) compute hasActiveFilters, (2) render Clear Filters button next to SearchBar, (3) always visible, disabled when no active filters, (4) remove old below-FilterPanel placement, (5) keep no-results Clear all filters. Claude fallback (authorized 2026-05-22): (6) expand scope to search-bar.tsx — add py-2 text-sm to input for height consistency; (7) add w-28 shrink-0 justify-center to Search button to prevent width shift on loading state. tsc must pass.
tickets.verification: docker compose exec frontend npx tsc --noEmit exit 0; manual retest SRCH-04

tickets.description: Two changes in two files. (1) frontend/components/features/auth/LoginForm.tsx: add method="post" to the <form> tag (line ~39, currently `<form className="space-y-6" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>`). Change to `<form method="post" className="space-y-6" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>`. (2) frontend/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx: LoginForm uses useSearchParams() which requires a Suspense boundary. Wrap <LoginForm /> with <Suspense fallback={null}>. Import Suspense from 'react'.
tickets.verification: sg docker -c "docker compose run --rm --no-deps frontend sh -c 'node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit'"
